title: Bellisseria Birthday Bash
desc: Bellisseria Birthday Bash brings a week-long celebration to the Fairgrounds with tours, live DJs, and collectible passport stamps. Visitors can explore by air, sea, and land, take part in driving and flying challenges, and join community ceremonies from April 14–20. Learn more at gazetteorg.wordpress.com

title: Burn2 - Burnal Equinox
desc: Experience BURN2, the festival of community, art, and fire that brings the culture and cool of Burning Man to the metaverse. The current event: Burnal Equinox - Below the Surface, runs from April 17 to 19, 2026, and features an immersive underwater experience with live DJs, reactive visuals, and interactive spaces for dancing, exploration, and social connection. Learn more at www.burn2.org

title: Willowmere
desc: Welcome to Willowmere, a hidden little coffee shop nestled in nature, created as a peaceful place to slow down, unwind, and just breathe.

title: KT RENTALS
desc: At KT RENTALS, furnished or unfurnished skyboxes are available for different prices: 50-75-100-150-500 L$ week, with a 10% discount for 4 weeks.

title: Tiger Lily Art Gallery
desc: A gallery exploring the dark side of human nature through the power of expressive painting and the ascetic aesthetics of neo-primitivism.

title: Velvet Bohème
desc: Lose yourself in Velvet Bohème, a two-week boho festival blending shopping, art, music, and literature in Second Life. Shop, soak up the atmosphere, or catch a live singer or DJ from partner venues Altitude and Sanctum. Open April 4 to 18, 2026.

title: Skill Gaming Region: Spin City Games
desc: Spin City Games is a skill gaming destination focused on spinning wheels, jackpots, and replay-based games. Visitors can test their luck with contests, slide games, and high roller options, with freeplay and noob-friendly areas for easy entry.

title: Tsumori City
desc: Discover Tsumori City, a peaceful yet vibrant mountain side destination near the scenic Hanami Path, where rich cultural influences blend with modern city life, surrounded by cherry blossoms, riverside walkways, and towering peaks, offering a warm, welcoming atmosphere filled with activities, good food, and beautiful places to explore.

title: Tsumori Hanami
desc: Along the quiet stretch of the Hanami Path, Tsumori Hanami unfolds in drifting petals, soft flowing water, and peaceful seasonal blooms. Visitors can follow the path through gentle scenery and calming light, enjoying a slow, soothing atmosphere perfect for quiet walks, reflection, and photography, with the cozy Sage Panda Café just a short stroll away for anyone wanting a warm treat nearby.

title: Illuminating Machinima at SLEA
desc: Calling all machinima artists! Step into SLVCG's 2nd Annual Illuminating Machinima at SLEA, a full region designed as a cinematic playground, featuring four unique, genre-themed environments by talented designers and artists. Explore a haunted swamp, a vibrant waterfront skate park, an anime-inspired toon land, and a neon-lit Neo Japan city. Capture your next story and bring your vision to life!

title: Velvet Bohème idkytevs
desc: Lose yourself in Velvet Bohème, a two-week boho festival blending shopping, art, music, and literature in Second Life. Shop, soak up the atmosphere, or catch a live singer or DJ from partner venues Altitude and Sanctum. Open April 4 to 18, 2026.

title: Summit Adventures
desc: Step into a world where the future meets escape. Summit Adventures is a premier destination in Second Life designed for connection, exploration, and unforgettable moments. From thrilling rides and immersive attractions to peaceful spaces and luxury environments, every detail is crafted to elevate your experience. Whether you're spending time with family, enjoying a night with friends, or discovering something new, Summit offers the perfect balance of excitement and atmosphere. This is more than a destination. It’s an experience. The future awaits.

title: Whispering Wild Rose
desc: Whispering Wild Rose is a rock club centered around music, live DJs, and community gatherings. Home to the Skullfire WW MC, it offers a dedicated motorcycle track alongside spaces to relax, connect, and enjoy events with hosts and fellow visitors.

title: Sandcastles
desc: Welcome to Sandcastles Adventure Park! Ride the rush of towering tsunami waves, sail out to open seas, then hit the track for high-speed racing across massive double-region courses designed for cars and bikes. Step into mystery at Merlin’s Cave and have your fortune told, or head over to the Gaming Lodge to try your luck with Greedy and classic casino games. Take to the skies or sea with a full range of free rentals—boats, submarines, balloon, sailboats, planes, helicopters, and windsurfing. Enjoy the park's diverse wildlife and dive deeper into nature at the underwater park. Looking for something more relaxing? Discover hidden romantic spots perfect for couples, or explore countless scenic locations across the region. Don’t miss the satellite destination in Bay City, where you can enjoy horseback riding and open-road driving adventures. Bring a friend—or someone special—and experience escape at Sandcastles.

title: Norway Racing Festival yrTsIZhi
desc: Norway Racing Festival is a multi-day virtual motorsport event hosted in Second Life, bringing together racing enthusiasts, drivers, performers, and creators from around the world. The festival features races, drift shows, live performances, contests, and community-driven activities, all designed to create an immersive and exciting motorsport experience. The event runs from March 16th through the grand finale on the 22nd. Learn more at nrfevent.com

title: Pand’Onsen
desc: Pand’Onsen (Pandimonium) is a Japanese-inspired destination centered on combat and training. Visitors can explore dojos, practice with katana and other weapons, and take part in sparring and role play. The region blends traditional and urban elements, with spaces for training, combat, and casual activities.

title: GUY Magazine PRIDE in Space 2026
desc: GUY Magazine PRIDE in Space 2026 is this year’s installment of GUY Magazine’s annual Pride festival, hosted at The Portal. It features shopping, games, carnival rides, live acts, and parties throughout June, with an opening celebration on May 31 and events like live dance shows and a K-pop concert.

title: All Out Music
desc: All Out Music is a vibrant dance club where every event feels like a celebration. DJs spin feel-good hits from the 50s to today, including pop, rock, R&B, country, EDM, and more, keeping the dance floor alive from start to finish. With dynamic lighting, an upbeat crowd, and nonstop energy, it’s the perfect place to let loose, dance, and enjoy an unforgettable time.

title: White Valley
desc: White Valley is a ski resort with a variety of activities. You can rent a cabin in the mountains for a week or more, enjoying the mountains and winter sports. You'll find ski slopes, a large ice rink, a games room, a natural hot spring, a spa, and more. Come and relax, breathe in the fresh air, and enjoy!

title: Excalibur Club
desc: Excalibur Club is an Italian dance destination focused on live DJs and singers, where visitors gather to enjoy music, dance, and spend time together in a lively atmosphere. The space encourages a friendly, respectful environment for shared moments and entertainment. Club per passare bei momnenti insieme con bella musica dove si balla e si sta in allegria.

title: Etopia Earth Day Celebrations
desc: To help celebrate Earth Day for 2026, you're invited to explore, engage, and enjoy exhibits, activities, and discussions related to the theme "Our power, Our Planet". From wetlands exploration to bike trails, train rides to meditation spots, conversations and resources to cafes and gondola rides. Celebrations will kick off on 17 April and close with an Earth Day dance on 23 April at Etopia in Second Life.

title: Nitroglobus Roof Gallery
desc: Nitroglobus Gallery is a Second Life art gallery that shows impressive exhibitions and installations of both emerging and well-known artists and is owned and curated by Dido Haas. The current exhibition is INFINITY WALL by Bamboo Barnes. The exhibit reveals her deepest feelings: uncertainty, vulnerability, and a quiet pain that has been lingering with her. The result is a powerful and intimate body of work that invites you to look closer.

title: Bid the Lindens Bald bUOYCQwW
desc: Bid the Lindens & Moles Bald returns for its 10th annual showdown in support of Relay For Life in Second Life. Teams of Lindens and Moles literally put their hair on the line. Residents vote with their donations: the teams that raise the most keep their locks, while the team that raises the least will go bald until the next birthday celebrations. Voting opens during RelayStock on April 10 and runs through April 15, culminating in the always-entertaining Haircut Party from 12:00–2:30 PM SLT, with the clippers coming out at 2:15 PM SLT. Learn more at relayrockers.org/bidthelindensbald

title: VWBPE 2026 Conference BzfnytvE
desc: The Virtual Worlds Best Practices in Education Conference runs March 19–21, 2026. This open conference is organized by educators to showcase learning, tools, and methods for virtual environments. Join the event for three days of lectures, workshops, discussions, games, and more - including a keynote speech by the Founder of Second Life, Philip Rosedale, and interviews with other Linden Lab executives. Learn more at vwbpe.org

title: Oulbury
desc: Oulbury is a curated coastal roleplay destination built around a “cozy horror” atmosphere, where slow-burn storytelling and supernatural elements shape everyday life. Set on a fog-covered North Atlantic island, the town blends quiet routines with subtle unease. Regular events, environmental systems like dynamic weather, and interconnected spaces create a living world where the atmosphere is as important as the story.
